title: Shimla Sightseeing Tour Package
summary: 3D/2N classic Shimla heritage circuit — The Ridge, Mall Road, Jakhoo, and Viceregal Lodge with hotel and transfers. From ₹6,999.
overview:
Discover Shimla's colonial heart with guided pacing across The Ridge, Christ Church, Scandal Point, Jakhoo Temple, and Viceregal Lodge. Ideal for first-time visitors who want walkable heritage without rushing every viewpoint.

This package balances Mall Road evenings with one scenic half-day buffer so families and couples can enjoy cafés, bakeries, and Lakkar Bazaar crafts without exhaustion.

gallery.alt: Shimla Ridge and Christ Church view
Mall Road evening walk in Shimla

seo.title: Shimla Sightseeing Tour Package | India Holiday Destinations
seo.description: Book a 3D/2N Shimla sightseeing package covering The Ridge, Mall Road, Jakhoo Temple, and heritage walks with hotels and transfers.

title: Shimla Kufri Chail Tour Package
summary: 4D/3N Shimla with Kufri and Chail day trips — forests, viewpoints, and palace lawns. From ₹9,499.
overview:
Combine Shimla town heritage with the classic Kufri snow-and-viewpoint circuit and a Chail palace-pine day. Perfect for travellers who want more than Mall Road alone.

Includes paced transfers, hotel nights in/near Shimla, and flexible winter notes for snow play at higher points.

gallery.alt: Pine forests on the Chail road

seo.title: Shimla Kufri Chail Tour Package | India Holiday Destinations
seo.description: Plan a 4D/3N Shimla trip with Kufri and Chail day excursions, hotels, and scenic Himachal transfers.

title: Shimla Honeymoon Tour Package
summary: 5D/4N romantic Shimla honeymoon with quieter stays, sunset viewpoints, and Kufri/Mashobra calm. From ₹14,999.
overview:
A slower honeymoon rhythm for couples: heritage evenings on The Ridge, café dates, one scenic nature day, and optional Mashobra quiet time.

Designed for newlyweds who want atmosphere over checklist tourism—fireplace evenings, valley views, and private transfer pacing.

seo.title: Shimla Honeymoon Tour Package | India Holiday Destinations
seo.description: Book a romantic 5D/4N Shimla honeymoon package with scenic stays, sunset walks, and relaxed Himachal pacing.

title: Shimla Manali Tour Package
summary: 6D/5N Shimla to Manali hill circuit with sightseeing transfers and dual-base hotels. From ₹16,999.
overview:
Link two classic Himachal favourites: start with Shimla heritage and cool Ridge walks, then continue to Manali for Beas valley scenery and Solang/local sightseeing options.

Built for travellers who want a complete North India hill holiday without planning every taxi hour themselves.

gallery.alt: Shimla to Manali mountain highway views

seo.title: Shimla Manali Tour Package | India Holiday Destinations
seo.description: Combine Shimla and Manali in a 6D/5N Himachal tour package with hotels, transfers, and paced sightseeing.
